mapper.select:
SELECT r.reservation_id, m.name, rt.room_name, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.total_price, r.reservation_status FROM reservation r
JOIN TBL_MEMBER_SECURITY m ON r.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id
WHERE r.checkin_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.checkin_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 AND r.reservation_status = 'CONFIRMED'
ORDER BY r.checkin_date

SELECT r.reservation_id, m.name, rt.room_name, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.total_price, r.reservation_status FROM reservation r
JOIN TBL_MEMBER_SECURITY m ON r.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id
WHERE r.checkout_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND r.checkout_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 1 AND r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN'
ORDER BY r.checkout_date

SELECT r.reservation_id, m.name, rt.room_name, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.total_price, r.reservation_status FROM reservation r
JOIN TBL_MEMBER_SECURITY m ON r.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id
WHERE r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_IN'
ORDER BY r.checkin_date

SELECT r.reservation_id, m.name, rt.room_name, r.checkin_date, r.checkout_date, r.total_price, r.reservation_status FROM reservation r
JOIN TBL_MEMBER_SECURITY m ON r.member_no = m.member_no
JOIN room_type rt ON r.room_type_id = rt.room_type_id
WHERE r.reservation_status = 'CHECKED_OUT'
ORDER BY r.checkout_date
